title: TestMetadata
description: One test's metadata record (cell × protocol × temperature). Stored as JSON at data/harmonized/tests/{test_id}.json — one file per test.

soh_pct.description: Cell state of health at time of test, as % of BOL capacity. See soh_method for how this specific value was computed.

soh_method.description: How soh_pct was computed: 'bol_assumption' = stamped 100% because the test is a single fresh-cell characterization (ORNL, HNEI); 'capacity_vs_first_checkpoint' = CC discharge capacity normalized by the cell's first checkpoint (reserved for aging-checkup sources); 'resistance_pulse' = derived from pulse ΔV/ΔI vs BOL (reserved for future aged-HPPC sources like NASA PCoE); null when soh_pct itself is null.

cycle_count_at_test.description: Aging cycles elapsed before this test. 0 = BOL (begin of life) / fresh cell characterization.

source_doi.description: DOI of the paper or dataset that published this test.

source_url.description: Canonical landing page URL for the source dataset.

source_citation.description: Formatted citation for the source test — include in any publication using this data.

source_license.description: SPDX identifier for the test's license (e.g. CC-BY-4.0, ODbL-1.0, MIT, CC0-1.0).

source_license_url.description: URL of the full license text.

n_samples.description: Observed: number of timeseries samples in this test.

duration_s.description: Observed: total elapsed time (seconds) of the test.

sample_dt_median_s.description: Observed: median dt between consecutive samples.

sample_dt_max_s.description: Observed: maximum dt — large values flag sampling gaps.
